title: Increasing Our Absorption in Service of Lord Krishna | Sri Satya Gaurachandra Dasa | SB 3.2.6 |
speaker: HG Satya Gaura Chandra Dasa

The creeper of devotional service gradually grows so high that it passes through the entire material universe and enters into the spiritual sky,
growing still higher and higher until it reaches the planet Goloka Vrindavana.
The devotee gardener is in touch with the abode of the Lord even from the material plane by dint of performing devotional service to the Lord simply by hearing and chanting.
As a creeper takes shelter of another, stronger tree similarly, the creeper of devotional service, nourished by the devotee, takes shelter of the lotus feet of the Lord and thus becomes fixed.
When the creeper is fixed, then the fruit of the creeper comes into existence and the gardener who nourished it is able to enjoy this fruit of love and his life becomes successful.
That Uddhava attained this stage is evident from his dealings.
He could simultaneously reach this place.
He could simultaneously reach this place.
He could simultaneously reach this place.
So we are reading from the chapter titled Remembrance of Lord Krishna.
So in this chapter Vidura approaches Uddhava and asks about Krishna's activities and past times.
So Uddhava, as he approaches Uddhava,
as soon as he hears the holy name of Krishna,
he immediately goes into devotional ecstasy.
And in this verse,
he is a
Shanakair Bhagaval Lokan.
He enters into the spiritual world by his meditation on the past times of the Lord.
And so in this verse we see that Shanakair,
slowly he came back from Bhagaval Lokan from the plane of the transcendental world to Nulokam Punaragata.
He came back to this material plane and then Vimrujya Netre he wiping his eyes, Viduram.
He saw Vidura.
And then Vimrujya Netre he wiping his eyes, Viduram.
And then he started remembering the Krishna's past times.
And in the next slokas we are going to see,
the most exalted devotee Uddhava speaking about Krishna to Vidura.
So here the in the first line Prabhupada says,
The third line exerts down my ground is,
says when Uddhava was fully absorbed in the transcendental ecstasy of love of god
he actually forgot all about the external world so here the key word is fully absorbed
in the transcendental ecstasy of love of god
so he is so much absorbed that he forgot all about the external world
so the whole process of bhakti yoga is aimed at developing this full absorption in krishna
as we practice this bhakti yoga
quickly we understand that our mind is not resting on krishna
full absorption
is only possible intermittently we are not able to really be absorbed 24 hours in krishna
but here Uddhava is in a different plane complete absorption in krishna
and why we are not able to absorb in krishna completely because there are many
contaminations in the heart the contaminations which are still attractive to us
there are so many contaminations in the heart they are very very attractive to us
because we are not able to absorb in krishna
and because of those attractions we are not able to get attracted to krishna
and then develop full absorption
so in this path of bhakti yoga to develop this full absorption on krishna
we need the shelter of an ecstatic lover of krishna
a spiritual master who is having such absorption in krishna only he will be able to guide us
so anybody who takes comes in touch with prabhupad
he will for sure conquer his contamination in the heart and gradually develop this full absorption
